PostToolUse.command: STATE="$PROJECT_ROOT/.agents/.session-state" && touch "$STATE" && COUNT=$(head -1 "$STATE" 2>/dev/null || echo 0) && COUNT=$((COUNT + 1)) && printf '%d\n' "$COUNT" > "$STATE" && if [ $((COUNT % 5)) -eq 0 ]; then printf '{"additionalContext":"📋 Checkpoint: %d tool calls. Log new patterns, decisions, or changes to .agents/skills/learnings.md. If skills changed, run /update-skills."}' "$COUNT"; else echo '{"continue":true}'; fi
